message:
feat(demo): add render determinism proofs and improve showcase screens

Extends the demo showcase with comprehensive render determinism and
event-driven tests, particularly for the layout lab screen.

Layout Lab (layout_lab.rs, +450 lines):
- Add render_deterministic_all_presets test proving identical checksums
  for consecutive renders of every preset at multiple terminal sizes
- Add event-driven tests verifying Tab/Shift+Tab preset cycling,
  constraint editing, resize recovery, and constraint type toggling
- Each test emits structured JSONL diagnostics for CI analysis

Metaballs (metaballs.rs):
- Replace inline coordinate normalization loops with shared
  fill_normalized_coords() utility from the sampling module,
  eliminating duplicate code

Theme (theme.rs):
- Expand theme token set with additional accessibility-related tokens
  for high contrast and reduced motion modes

Other screen refinements:
- action_timeline: add missing event handling annotations
- advanced_text_editor: improve cursor movement test coverage
- snapshot_player: fix frame indexing edge case
- visual_effects: adjust effect parameters for deterministic rendering

Docs (visual-fx.md):
- Document new backdrop effect configuration options and theme
  integration patterns

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
